jsonLd.title: Vacancy for Teacher at Jetking
jsonLd.description:
Jetking, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Teacher for our Ludhiana operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Jetking:
Jetking is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Support students with special educational needs
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in Child Psychology

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Professional development and training programs
• Flexible working hours
• Referral bonus program
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Ludhiana, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Jetking!
